body_txt: The heavens are blue . Therefore, heavenly beings, whether gods or angels or saints, use blue — usually sky blue — to show their relationship, as do beings associated with them. Much more likely to be Good than Evil (in the former case, see Blue Is Heroic , and for the latter, see Black and Blue and Scary All Over ). May be used only as an accent in Gold and White Are Divine , or use white and gold as an accent. Innocent Blue Eyes may invoke this. Often a major color in Fluffy Cloud Heaven . Compare Purple Is Powerful , True Blue Femininity , Bluebird of Happiness , Gold and White Are Divine , Blue Is Calm , White Is Pure . Contrast Big Red Devil , Red and Black and Evil All Over , and Red Eyes, Take Warning .
